description_long: This house features a sprawling, single-story layout with multiple interconnected rooms and open spaces, typical of a modern suburban residence. The exterior walls are predominantly white with large window sections and several entry points, suggesting a focus on natural light and accessibility. The roof is flat, with some areas possibly accommodating skylights or rooftop access. Interior spaces are visually divided by color and material changes, with darker flooring in central living areas and lighter tones in bedrooms and bathrooms. The house includes several large doorways and what appear to be garage or utility spaces, indicating a design for family living. The overall structure is rectangular with some protruding sections, giving it a contemporary, modular appearance.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior walls, large windows, and a spacious, open-plan layout. The design emphasizes natural light, accessibility, and contemporary aesthetics.
description_view_0: This view highlights the house's open-plan layout, with visible interior divisions and large window sections along the exterior walls.
description_view_1: From this angle, the central living areas with darker flooring are prominent, and multiple entry points and garage-like spaces are visible.
description_view_2: This side shows the modular, rectangular structure with several protruding sections and a clear view of the flat roof design.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the interconnected rooms, lighter-toned private spaces, and the overall contemporary, sprawling footprint.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large window sections
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, minimal steps, and a clean, modern overhang with no ornate decorations.
